prompt: Create a bold, high-contrast black and white portrait of a confident young man wearing a black leather jacket, facing slightly sideways with an intense expression. Use dramatic studio lighting with sharp shadows and detailed skin texture for a cinematic look. Add strong red graphic elements layered over the image, including a horizontal red bar across the eyes, geometric shapes, thin lines, and framing boxes. Incorporate large, bold typography in the background and foreground. Use a modern sans-serif font with repeated faded text behind the subject (like a name pattern), and a strong motivational headline in bright red such as: “WORK SMART NOT HARD”. Design layout should feel like a premium sports or streetwear campaign poster. Keep the background minimal and textured grey. Add subtle branding-style elements like a hashtag (#AD) and small text like “GRAPHICS”. Color palette: black, white, grey, and vibrant red only. Style: clean, modern, aggressive, editorial, Nike-style campaign poster. Focus on sharp details, contrast, and composition balance.
